sql:
CREATE TABLE "intents" (
	"id" text PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	"order_id" text NOT NULL,
	"intent_type" text NOT NULL,
	"data" text NOT NULL,
	"created_at" integer NOT NULL
);
ALTER TABLE "intents" ALTER COLUMN "created_at" TYPE bigint;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "intents_order_id_unique" ON "intents" ("order_id");

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
	"id" text PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	"address" text NOT NULL,
	"name" text NOT NULL,
	"chain_id" bigint NOT NULL,
	"decimals" bigint NOT NULL,
	"is_manual" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
	"is_testnet" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE "transaction_receipts" (
	"id" text PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	"chain_id" bigint NOT NULL,
	"tx_hash" text NOT NULL,
	"receipt" text NOT NULL,
	"created_at" bigint NOT NULL
);
ALTER TABLE "intents" ALTER COLUMN "created_at" SET DATA TYPE bigint;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "tokens_address_chain_idx" ON "tokens" USING btree ("address","chain_id");
